studyName: NextGen Consortium: The iPSCORE (iPSC Collection for Omic Research) Resource for Studying the Impact of Genetic Variation on Molecular Phenotypes

tables.description: This sample attributes table includes sample histological type, tumor status, clone and passage number of cell lines, method used to generate iPSCs, UCSD source tissue, UCSD iPSC clone, UCSD differentiation, WiCell), analyte type, sample source, genotyping center, sequencing center, array version, array coordinates (n=2 variables; Illumina and paired germline sample), differentiation protocol, chromatin based assay, sample name, day of cardiomyocyte differentiation, indicator for whether the iPSC molecular sample was matched to a CM or CVPC sample, indicator for pooled sample, RNA assay type, and indicator if the sample was published and the name of the substudy/paper (n=19 variables).

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Analyte Type

variables.name: ARRAY_VERSION
variables.description: Version of array

variables.name: CHROMATIN_ASSAY_TYPE
variables.description: The type of assay performed for chromatin-based assays

variables.name: CLONE
variables.description: Original clone number from which cell line was expanded

variables.name: DIFFERENTIATION_PROTOCOL
variables.description: Differentation protocol used for iPSC-derived samples

variables.name: GENOTYPING_CENTER
variables.description: Name of the center which conducted genotyping

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: Cell or tissue type or subtype of sample

variables.name: ILLUMINA_ARRAY_COORDINATES
variables.description: Array number and coordinates for arrays

variables.name: IPSC_MATCHED_TO_CM
variables.description: Indicator for whether the iPSC molecular sample was matched to a CM or CVPC sample

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
variables.description: Tumor status

variables.name: MATCHED_GERMLINE_ARRAY
variables.description: ILLUMINA_ARRAY_COORDINATES of paired germline sample for iPSC

variables.name: PASSAGE
variables.description: Passage number of cell line which was analysed

variables.name: POOLED_SAMPLE
variables.description: Indicator for whether sample is a pool of other samples

variables.name: PUBLISHED
variables.description: Indicator for whether sample was part of a published study

variables.name: REPROGRAMMING_METHOD
variables.description: The technology used to generate induced pluripotent stem cells (iPSCs)

variables.name: RNA_ASSAY_TYPE
variables.description: Type of assay performed for RNA

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: De-identified unique Sample ID

variables.name: SAMPLE_NAME
variables.description: De-identified Sample name containing experimental condition identifiers

variables.name: SAMPLE_SOURCE
variables.description: Organisation providing original sample

variables.name: SEQUENCING_CENTER
variables.description: Name of the center which conducted sequencing

variables.name: SUBSTUDY_ABERRANT_METHYLATION_PMID28388429
variables.description: Indicator for whether sample was part of paper studying aberrant iPSC methylation in twins (PMID 28388429)

variables.name: SUBSTUDY_CM_EPDC_MIXTURE
variables.description: Indicator for whether sample was generated using different proportions of CM and EPDC (unpublished)

variables.name: SUBSTUDY_CM_LNCRNA
variables.description: Indicator for whether sample was part of paper examining lncrnas in iPSC-CMs (unpublished)

variables.name: SUBSTUDY_CM_TIMECOURSE
variables.description: Indicator for whether sample was part of the cardiomyocyte timecourse study (RNA was published in PMID 28410642)

variables.name: SUBSTUDY_CVPC_ALTSPLICE_PMID35226669
variables.description: Indicator for whether sample was part of paper studying alternative splicing in CVPC (PMID 35226669)

variables.name: SUBSTUDY_CVPC_CHRX_DIFF_PMID31668852
variables.description: Indicator for whether sample was part of paper examining differentiation of iPSCs to iPSC-derived cardiomyocytes or cardiovascular precursor cells (CVPC) (PMID 31668852)

variables.name: SUBSTUDY_CVPC_EQTL_PMID36854752
variables.description: Indicator for whether sample was part of paper studying eQTL in iPSC-derived cardiovascular progenitor cells (PMID 36854752)

variables.name: SUBSTUDY_IFNG_STIMULATION
variables.description: Indicator for whether sample was part of paper studying molecular and epigenomic changes in IFNg-stimulated cardiovascular progenitor cells (https://doi.org/10.1101/2024.05.03.592380)

variables.name: SUBSTUDY_INTER_INTRA
variables.description: Indicator for whether sample was part of paper studying inter- and intra-variability between iPSC clones (unpublished)

variables.name: SUBSTUDY_IPSCORE_SV_PMID32522985_PMID32522982
variables.description: Indicator for whether sample was part of paper examining structural variation in iPSCORE (PMID 32522982, 32522982)

variables.name: SUBSTUDY_IPSC_CM_HIC_PMID30837461
variables.description: Indicator for whether sample was part of paper studying Hi-C in iPSCs and iPSC-derived cardiomyocytes (PMID 30837461)

variables.name: SUBSTUDY_IPSC_CM_NKX25_PMID31570892
variables.description: Indicator for whether sample was part of paper studying allele-specific NKX2-5 binding in iPSC-derived cardiomyocytes (PMID 31570892)

variables.name: SUBSTUDY_IPSC_COACCESSIBILITY_PMID38395976
variables.description: Indicator for whether sample was part of paper examining co-accessibility between ATAC sites within iPSCs (PMID 38395976)

variables.name: SUBSTUDY_IPSC_EQTL_PMID28388430
variables.description: Indicator for whether sample was part of paper studying expression quantitative trait loci (eQTL) in iPSC (PMID 28388430)

variables.name: SUBSTUDY_IPSC_SOMATIC_PMID30044985
variables.description: Indicator for whether sample was part of paper studying the mutational burden of iPSCs (PMID 30044985)

variables.name: SUBSTUDY_MULTI_QTL
variables.description: Indicator for whether sample was part of paper studying multi-omic QTLs in iPSC and derived tissues (https://doi.org/10.1101/2024.04.10.588874)

variables.name: SUBSTUDY_PPC_EQTL_PMID37903777
variables.description: Indicator for whether sample was part of paper studying eQTL in iPSC-derived pancreatic progenitor cells (PMID 37903777)

variables.name: SUBSTUDY_RPE_PILOT_PMID31080113
variables.description: Indicator for whether sample was part of paper examining the utility of iPSC-derived retinal pigment epithelium to study the genetics of eye diseases (PMID 31080113)

variables.name: SUBSTUDY_iPSCORE_RESOURCE_PMID28410642
variables.description: Indicator for whether sample was part of iPSCORE resource paper (PMID 28410642)

variables.name: TIMECOURSE_DAY_OF_CM_DIFF
variables.description: Day of cardiomyocyte differentiation

variables.name: UCSD_DIFFERENTIATION_ID
variables.description: Differentiation ID indicating the order in which the derived cell type was differentiated within a given study. Molecular samples with the same Differentiation ID were generated from the same derived cell type. iPSC molecular samples with Differentiation IDs were derived from the iPSC line at D0 of the differentiation protocol.

variables.name: UCSD_SOURCE_TISSUE_ID
variables.description: UUID Identifier for tissue sample of fibroblast, blood or iPSC

variables.name: WICELL_ID
variables.description: WiCell identifier assigned to iPSC line archived at WiCell Research Institute, Wisconsin, USA

tables.description: This subject phenotype table includes IPSCORE IDs, subject's sex, age at enrollment, race (n=3 variables; self-reported, race/ethnicity grouped by researcher, and genetically similar population groups), heart diagnoses (n=5 variables; primary diagnoses and classification, other diagnoses, comments, and disease ontology).

variables.name: AGE
variables.description: Subject age at enrollment

variables.name: DISEASE_ONTOLOGY_CODE
variables.description: Disease ontology (DO) code for primary heart diagnoses as described http://www.disease-ontology.org/ and obtained through http://www.malacards.org/

variables.name: GENETICALLY_SIMILAR_POPULATION_GROUP
variables.description: Most similar super population group as estimated by comparing the individuals SNPs to the 1KG dataset by PCA. This value is the super population values from 1KG, not eg "Asian".

variables.name: HEART_DISEASE_CATEGORY
variables.description: Classification of primary heart diagnoses for individuals recruited through the UCSD Sulpizio Cardiovascular Center

variables.name: HEART_DISEASE_COMMENT
variables.description: Comment on heart diagnoses for individuals recruited through the UCSD Sulpizio Cardiovascular Center

variables.name: OTHER_HEART_DIAGNOSES
variables.description: Other (non-primary) heart diagnoses for individuals recruited through the UCSD Sulpizio Cardiovascular Center

variables.name: PRIMARY_HEART_DIAGNOSES
variables.description: Primary heart diagnosis for individuals recruited through the UCSD Sulpizio Cardiovascular Center

variables.name: RACE_ETHNICITY_GROUPING
variables.description: Race/ethnicity category as grouped by researcher

variables.name: REPORTED_RACE_ETHNICITY
variables.description: Reported race/ethnicity of participant as recorded by fill in the blank

variables.name: SEX
variables.description: Subject sex

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: De-identified unique Subject ID with the format of either a universally unique identifier (UUID) for subjects with data or the iPSCORE_ID for those that are only in pedigree file

variables.name: iPSCORE_ID
variables.description: De-identified Subject ID

tables.description: This pedigree data table contains family relationships in the format of family IDs, subject IDs, father IDs, mother IDs, subjects's sex, monozygotic twin IDs, and indicator for monozygotic and dizygotic twins.

variables.name: FAMILY_ID
variables.description: Family ID

variables.name: FATHER_SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Father's SUBJECT_ID

variables.name: MOTHER_SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Mother's SUBJECT_ID

variables.name: MZorDZ
variables.description: An indicator when an individual is a monozygotic or dizygotic twin.

variables.name: SEX
variables.description: Subject sex

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: SUBJECT_ID

variables.name: TWIN_ID
variables.description: Number indicating pair of monozygotic twins

tables.description: The subject consent data table Includes subject IDs, consent information, and pooled subject IDs. The subject ID was uniquely generated for each pooled sample - they do not correspond to any individual. Pooled samples are when cells from multiple samples are combined and processed and sequenced as a single sample. There are pooled samples for scRNA-seq, snATAC-seq, and control ChIP inputs.

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: CONSENT

variables.name: POOLED_SUBJECT
variables.description: Indicator of whether subject is a pool of other subjects

variables.name: SEX
variables.description: Subject sex

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: SUBJECT_ID

variables.name: SUBJECT_IDS_OF_POOLED_SAMPLES
variables.description: Comma separated list of pooled SUBJECT_IDs which this subject is a part of. 0 if the SUBJECT_ID is not in a pool of subjects.

tables.description: This data table contains mapping of study subject IDs to sample IDs. Samples are the final preps submitted for genotyping, sequencing, and/or expression data. For example, if one patient (subject ID) gave one sample, and that sample was processed differently to generate 2 sequencing runs, there would be two rows, both using the same subject ID, but having 2 unique sample IDs. Pooled samples are when cells from multiple samples are combined and processed and sequenced as a single sample. There are pooled samples for scRNA-seq, snATAC-seq, and control ChIP inputs. The subject ID was uniquely generated for each pooled sample - they do not correspond to any individual.

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID
